positive: A highly detailed, central composition illustration of an ethereal, bioluminescent forest under a nebula sky. The scene features stylized flora, crystalline trees, and gentle floating cosmic elements, all rendered with thick, clean linework and strong silhouettes. The palette is dominated by deep indigo, vibrant teal, phosphorescent cyan, and touches of glowing gold. The style should be highly graphic, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets modern maximalism, perfect for apparel printing. Use clean lines, high contrast, symmetrical composition, and clear negative space.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, grainy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, messy, low contrast, photorealism, grayscale, logos, trademarks, celebrity likenesses, copyrighted characters
